untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit swing leg length measurement and ratio comparison (upswing_length / downswing_length ratio, retracement percentage). These are derived swing analysis metrics not available as atomic indicators in the allowed set. The allowed indicators do not include swing detection, swing duration, or swing ratio comparisons. Would require custom swing detection logic outside the indicator library.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using ADX_14 (trend strength) and SMA_20 (uptrend confirmation) as alternatives, but this does not capture the core logic of comparing relative swing lengths and retracement percentages. The signal's core mechanism—monitoring upswing vs downswing length ratios and retracement limits—cannot be accurately expressed with the available indicators without swing-specific metrics.
